title: Sneak peek: Vibe coding AI agents course with Kaggle
summary: Google Cloud Tech and Kaggle are launching a 5-day intensive course teaching vibe coding for building autonomous AI agents. The course covers natural language-driven agent development, agent-to-agent communication, external API integrations, and culminates in a capstone competition (Kaggriculture) on the leaderboard.
